$A000: Cold start: disable NMI, IRQ, GRACTL, DMACTL; clear all hardware
$A037: JSR $B298 — read console switches, check for cartridge presence
$A066: Set up display list from template at $B776
$AE99: Main frame sync: wait for VCOUNT < $50 (top of visible area)
$B2A5: VBI immediate handler: sound + game timer updates
$B500: DLI handler: scanline kernel for sprite multiplexing + terrain colors
$B750: DLI for status bar area — position player sprites, clear collisions
$B773: JMP XITVBV — return from VBI through OS
